description_long: This warehouse is a rectangular, brick-and-timber structure with a steeply pitched, shingled gable roof featuring two dormer windows on each long side. The main facade includes a central entryway with a protruding gable and a large, dark wooden door that is partially open, flanked by large, multi-pane windows. The brickwork is weathered, with visible mortar and some discoloration, while the upper sections of the walls are finished in a lighter, stucco-like material. One end of the building features a shed-roofed extension clad in vertical, whitewashed wooden planks, suggesting a storage annex or utility area. The roof is covered in grayish shingles, and the dormers add architectural interest and likely provide natural light to the upper interior. The overall appearance is utilitarian yet detailed, with a mix of rustic and industrial elements suitable for an urban storage facility.
description: A weathered brick-and-timber warehouse with a steep gabled shingle roof, dormer windows, and a central entryway with a large wooden door. One end features a whitewashed wooden annex, adding to its utilitarian character.
description_view_0: The end view shows the triangular gable, a large multi-pane window, and the weathered brick and stucco wall, with the annex partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: The main facade displays the central entryway with a protruding gable, a large open wooden door, two dormer windows, and large multi-pane windows on either side.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the first, with a triangular gable, large window, and the annex now on the left, showing the same mix of brick and stucco.
description_view_3: The rear view highlights the long shingled roof, two dormer windows, the whitewashed wooden annex, and a large open door with a multi-pane window.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features weathered brickwork on the lower half, light stucco panels above, and large, multi-pane green-framed windows flanking a central entryway with a protruding gable and a heavy wooden door. Decorative dormer windows punctuate the steeply pitched shingle roof, and the annex at one end is clad in vertical whitewashed wood.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is a steeply pitched gable design covered in gray asphalt shingles, with two dormer windows on each long side and a small shed-roofed annex at one end. The roof appears weathered and functional, with no visible skylights or mechanical units.
